message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Need your CONSENT on 13 retro changes">
Marty, the retro synthesis has 13 proposed changes (see my broadcast message). 8/9 teammates have given CONSENT. We need your explicit consent or objections to proceed.

Quick summary of the 13 items:
1. CI wait rule (wait for green before next push)
2. Mini-retro after each CI build
3. Refactor step not optional
4. Glossary compliance check in pipeline
5. Accessible names checklist in DoD
6. Honest screen reader testing language
7. Reviewer coordination guidance
8. Driver handoff protocol
9. HTMX architecture reference
10. Deferred items tracking file
11. CI green gate for coordinator (CLAUDE.md)
12. Driver onboarding checklist (CLAUDE.md)
13. Exclude session transcripts from CI

Please reply CONSENT or specific objections.
</teammate-message>

content.text: It looks like the team lead may not have received or processed my earlier consent message. Let me resend it clearly.

input.content:
**CONSENT** -- all 13 items approved. I already sent a detailed consent message earlier but it may not have been received. To be explicit:

Items 1-13: CONSENT on all. No objections.

One product note for item #10 (Deferred Items Tracking): deferred items should also be reviewed during product discovery for the next feature, not just at retrospectives. I'll own that review.

That's 9/9. Ready to proceed with implementation of the retro changes and then the next task.

content.text: Consent resent. Standing by for the team lead to confirm 9/9 and move forward.
